title: context bundle schema
description: Language-agnostic contract for a bounded context package with provenance. See Sources/CapabilityBridge/CapabilityBridge.swift for the Swift reference implementation.

workspaceSnapshot.description: Optional snapshot or summary of the current workspace state.

noteRefs.description: References to notes included in the bundle.

memorySnippets.description: Short memory snippets promoted into the bundle.

artifactRefs.description: References to artifacts the capability should consider.

aurRefs.description: AUR (research/source) references included in the bundle.

omissions.description: Items intentionally excluded from the bundle, with reason.

freshness.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the bundle was assembled.

tokenBudget.description: Approximate token budget for the consuming capability.

rawContentPolicy.description: Policy controlling how raw content is handled (e.g. redact-sensitive).
